summary: Iteration 59 - Producer Royalty Split System. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. The royalty split system is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com / MAYAsimpSON37!! works
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits/summary requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits returns splits with earnings_history and total_earned
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits/summary returns active_splits, total_as_producer, total_as_artist, total_earned
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalty-splits returns all splits with total_distributed
Backend: PUT /api/admin/royalty-splits/{split_id} updates split percentages
Backend: PUT /api/admin/royalty-splits/{split_id} ensures producer+artist=100
Backend: POST /api/royalty-splits/calculate works for admin (distributes revenue)
Backend: POST /api/royalty-splits/calculate returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalty-splits returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: PUT /api/admin/royalty-splits/{split_id} returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: DEFAULT_SPLITS verified (basic=50/50, premium=40/60, unlimited=30/70, exclusive=0/100)
Frontend: Navigate to /royalty-splits page successfully
Frontend: Page title 'Royalty Splits' displayed
Frontend: Summary cards show Active Splits (1), Earned as Producer ($84.48), Earned as Artist ($0.00), Total Earned ($84.48)
Frontend: Active split card shows beat title 'Neon Dreams', PREMIUM LEASE badge, split bar visualization
Frontend: Expanding split shows producer/artist names (Kalmori Admin), status (ACTIVE), contract (N/A)
Frontend: Earnings history shows multiple months (2026-01 through 2026-04) with streams, gross revenue, and amounts
Frontend: 'How Royalty Splits Work' section shows 3 steps (Beat Licensed, Revenue Tracked, Auto-Distributed)
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Royalty Splits' link that navigates correctly and shows active state
seed_data_creation: Test non-admin user created during backend testing for 403 permission tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 tested the Producer Royalty Split System. Key endpoints: GET /api/royalty-splits (user's splits with earnings_history), GET /api/royalty-splits/summary (dashboard stats), POST /api/royalty-splits/calculate (admin distributes revenue), GET /api/admin/royalty-splits (all splits), PUT /api/admin/royalty-splits/{split_id} (update percentages). DEFAULT_SPLITS: basic_lease=50/50, premium_lease=40/60, unlimited_lease=30/70, exclusive=0/100. Splits are auto-created via Stripe webhook when beat purchases are confirmed. The test split 'Neon Dreams' (split_f5759bb4cd63) has been modified by admin to 100/0 split with $84.48 total distributed across 4 periods. Frontend shows all summary cards, active splits with expandable details, earnings history, and 'How It Works' section.

endpoints.GET /api/royalty-splits: Returns user's splits with earnings_history and total_earned
endpoints.GET /api/admin/royalty-splits: Returns all splits with total_distributed (admin only)
endpoints.PUT /api/admin/royalty-splits/{split_id}: Updates split percentages, ensures sum=100 (admin only)

royalty_split_system.auto_creation: Splits auto-created via Stripe webhook when beat purchase is confirmed

components.title: Royalty Splits
components.split_card: Shows beat title, license type badge, split bar visualization, total earned
components.expanded_details: Producer/artist names, status, contract, earnings history
